name: OpenFlow Honeypot (OFPot)
description: Redirects traffic for unused IPs to a honeypot, built on POX. Tool: https://github.com/upa/ofpot. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #441 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map OpenFlow Honeypot (OFPot) output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved OpenFlow Honeypot (OFPot) output file to parse instead of running it live.
